string.name: module_desc
string.value: module description

string.name: EntryAbility_desc
string.value: description

string.name: EntryAbility_label
string.value: mammoth

string.name: convert_markdown_styleMap_text
string.value: 1. `StyleMap`: Custom transformation rules. Here, it means: Heading 1 displays plain text.

string.name: convert_styleMap_text
string.value: 1. `StyleMap`: Custom conversion rules. Here, it means: Heading 1 is displayed in bold; bold is displayed in italics; italics are displayed as underlines; strikethrough is displayed in bold.

string.name: convert_includeEmbeddedStyleMap_text
string.value: 2. `includeEmbeddedStyleMap`: Controls how embedded style maps are handled in the document. A value of `false` disables embedded styles; a value of `true` uses embedded styles, with headings 1-6 displayed in italics.

string.name: convert_includeDefaultStyleMap_text
string.value: 3. `includeDefaultStyleMap`: Controls how the default style mapping is handled. A value of `false` means the default styles are not used, and headings 1-6 will be displayed as unstyled text; a value of `true` means the default styles are used.

string.name: convert_ignoreEmptyParagraphs_text
string.value: 4. `ignoreEmptyParagraphs`: Ignore blank paragraphs. If the value is true, blank paragraphs will not be parsed; otherwise, they will be parsed as P tags.

string.name: convert_idPrefix_text
string.value: 5. `idPrefix`: Adds a prefix to the automatically generated HTML ID. Setting idPrefix=hhhh- will result in the generated HTML ID having the prefix hhhh-.

string.name: convert_externalFileAccess_text
string.value: 6. `externalFileAccess`: Whether to allow access to the file system to read external files. If the text content is displayed normally, and the external file is displayed as an inaccessible image (the effect is the same in Node.js), then it is successful.

string.name: convert_long_text
string.value: 7. Long text test.

string.name: extractRaw_path_text
string.value: Raw text via sandbox path.

string.name: extractRaw_arraybuffer_text
string.value: Raw text via arraybuffer.

string.name: extractRaw_long_text
string.value: Long text test.

string.name: convertImag_dataUri_text
string.value: 1. dataUri: Uses the default image converter; the converter will be effective if the image displays correctly.

string.name: convertImag_imgElement_read_text
string.value: 2. imgElement: read reads the image file using the specified encoding. The converter is effective if the image is displayed correctly.

string.name: convertImag_imgElement_readAsArrayBuffer_text
string.value: 3. imgElement: readAsArrayBuffer treats the image file as an ArrayBuffer object for processing. If the image is displayed correctly, the converter will be effective.

string.name: convertImag_imgElement_readAsBase64String_text
string.value: 4. imgElement: readAsBase64String reads the image file as a base64 encoded string and processes it. If the image is displayed normally, the converter is effective.

string.name: convertImag_imgElement_readAsBuffer_text
string.value: 5. imgElement: readAsBuffer reads the image file as a buffer and processes it. If the image is displayed normally, the converter is effective.

string.name: convertImag_imgElement_replace_text
string.value: 6. In the image processor, replace the image with another image.

string.name: convertImag_replace_text
string.value: Replace image

string.name: embedStyleMap_parse_text
string.value: Parse file

string.name: embedStyleMap_doc_text
string.value: `embedStyleMap` generates a docx file. Reading the generated docx file will automatically include the styles mapped by `embedStyleMap`. In this case, headings 1-6 will be displayed as italic text. You can compare the differences using the "Parse file" button and other buttons.

string.name: embedStyleMap_get_text
string.value: Get the EmbeddedStyleMap of the document
